other_observers: Margie Joy, Clif Smith, Pearle Sandstorm-Smith, Bill Maynard, Byran Patrick all on 11/15. Dan Maynard on 11/16.; Found by me.
specific_location: Pueblo Reservoir State Wildlife Area, north west side of Pueblo Reservoir
description: A gull that was a little smaller than nearby Ring-billed Gulls. All yellow bill, black smudge on the collar, gray mantle which was a little darker than nearby Ring-billed Gulls. In flight black corners on the wing tips, with out any black, also paler primaries. The bird seems to flap more than the Ring-billed Gulls. See photo.Behaviors: Seen on the water and flying.Call: nonePlumage: adult in basic plumage
